about.label: About
about.title: Your Space in Seoul
about.subtitle: A home designed for comfort and exploration
about.desc1: A thoughtfully furnished 2-bedroom apartment with everything you need for a comfortable stay. Hotel-quality white linens, a cozy living area with floor seating, and a fully equipped kitchen for light cooking.
about.desc2: Located just steps from Hangang Park and the vibrant Yongsan neighborhood, it's the perfect base for morning walks along the river, exploring local cafes, or discovering Seoul's hidden gems.
about.desc3: Self check-in via keypad lock means you arrive on your own schedule. Everything is prepared for you to simply walk in, settle down, and start your Seoul adventure.
about.hostBio1: I'm a Seoul-based host who loves travel and spaces. As a traveler myself, I know how important your accommodation is in an unfamiliar city.
about.hostBio2: That's why I created HANGANG 204 — a place where visitors can truly relax and experience the daily life of Seoul. I hope this becomes a small sanctuary where you leave with fond memories.
about.hostBio3: I hope your time in Seoul remains a comfortable and enjoyable memory.

amenities.label: Amenities
amenities.title: What's Inside
amenities.subtitle: Everything you need for a comfortable stay, thoughtfully prepared.
amenities.bedroom1Desc: 2 Twin XL beds with hotel-style white linens
amenities.bedroom2Desc: 1 Queen bed with hotel-style white linens + Smart TV

rules.label: Good to know
rules.title: House Rules
rules.subtitle: A few guidelines for a pleasant stay
rules.checkinDesc: Check-in after 3:00 PM. Check-out by 11:00 AM.
rules.checkinNote: Late check-out available for 20,000 won/hour by arrangement.
rules.smokingDesc: The entire building is a non-smoking zone. Please smoke outside.
rules.smokingNote: Additional cleaning fee may apply if indoor smoking is confirmed.
rules.quietDesc: Please keep noise down after 10:00 PM.
rules.quietNote: This is a quiet residential area — please be considerate of neighbors.
rules.partyDesc: Parties, events, and pets are not permitted.
rules.shoesDesc: Please remove outdoor shoes inside. Indoor slippers are provided.
rules.cookingDesc: Please avoid cooking food with heavy oil or strong odors.
rules.cookingNote: For example: grilling meat, cooking fish, etc.
rules.wasteDesc: Please separate food waste and recycling (plastic, cans, glass, paper).
rules.wasteNote: Leave bags by the 1F entrance when full, or in-room for post-checkout handling.
rules.checkoutDesc: Please turn off all lights, AC, and electrical appliances before check-out.
rules.registeredOnly: Only registered guests may stay at the property.

faq.label: Questions?
faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your stay
faq.a1: Self check-in via keypad lock. You'll receive the access code before your arrival. Check-in is available after 3:00 PM. If you need to adjust timing, contact the host in advance — early/late arrangements are possible for an additional 20,000 won per hour.
faq.a2: Yes, paid parking is available on the premises. Contact the host for details about rates and availability.
faq.a3: HANGANG 204 is close to Hangang Park — perfect for morning walks or evening strolls along the river. The Yongsan neighborhood offers plenty of local restaurants, cafes, and shops. A 24-hour self-service laundromat with large washers and dryers is just 1 minute away on foot.
faq.q4: Can I cook in the kitchen?
faq.a4: Yes! The kitchen is equipped with an induction cooktop, microwave, electric kettle, toaster, refrigerator, and basic utensils. We just ask that you avoid cooking food with heavy oil or strong odors (like grilling meat or fish) as the smell can linger in the apartment.
faq.a5: For stays up to 3 nights: 8 regular towels + 4 body towels. For 4+ nights: 12 regular towels + 8 body towels. Additional towels available for a fee. A washing machine is provided, and there's a 24-hour laundromat 1 minute away.
faq.a6: Contact the host as soon as possible. Unidentified lost items may be disposed of during cleaning, so please reach out promptly.
faq.q7: Can I get a late check-out?
faq.a7: Late check-out is available by request at 20,000 won per hour. Contact the host to arrange. Guests with the 'Late Check-out' promotion may extend for 1 hour free of charge.
faq.moreQuestions: Have another question? Feel free to message the host anytime.
